text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 22 

VALUES: 0 = Individual was not Medicaid-eligible and not eligible for separate CHIP for the month 

1 = Individual was Medicaid-eligible but was not included in either Medicaid Expansion CHIP or a 
separate Title XXI CHIP for the month. These include blind and disabled people and low-income 
families with dependent children. 

2 = Individual was included in
